items.title: What’s the right path for AI?
items.summary_short: Conference speakers discussed the unfolding trajectory of AI and the benefits of shaping technology to meet people’s needs

topic_refs.headline: What’s the right path for AI?

items.title_zh: AI 的正确道路是什么？
items.summary_short_zh: 会议演讲者讨论了 AI 正在展开的发展轨迹，以及塑造技术以满足人们需求的益处

items.title: MIT and Hasso Plattner Institute establish collaborative hub for AI and creativity
items.summary_short: Jointly led by the MIT Morningside Academy for Design, MIT Schwarzman College of Computing, and the Hasso Plattner Institute in Potsdam, the hub will foster a dynamic community where computing, creativity, and human-centered innovation meet

topic_refs.headline: MIT and Hasso Plattner Institute establish collaborative hub for AI and creativity

items.title_zh: MIT 与 Hasso Plattner Institute 设立 AI 与创造力合作中心
items.summary_short_zh: 该中心由 MIT Morningside Academy for Design、MIT Schwarzman College of Computing 和位于波茨坦的 Hasso Plattner Institute 共同领导，将培育一个充满活力的社区，让计算、创造力与以人为本的创新在此交汇

source_sections.description_zh: 具有实质深度的长篇专家分析和研究解读。

source_sections.label: Research Papers
source_sections.description: Research papers and paper-trending signals tied to the current day.

items.title: DyMoE: Dynamic Expert Orchestration with Mixed-Precision Quantization for Efficient MoE Inference on Edge
items.summary_short: Despite the computational efficiency of MoE models, the excessive memory footprint and I/O overhead inherent in multi-expert architectures pose formidable challenges for real-time inference on resource-constrained edge platforms.

topic_refs.headline: DyMoE: Dynamic Expert Orchestration with Mixed-Precision Quantization for Efficient MoE Inference on Edge

items.title_zh: DyMoE：用于边缘端高效 MoE 推理的动态专家编排与混合精度量化
items.summary_short_zh: 尽管 MoE 模型在计算上高效，但多专家架构固有的过大内存占用和 I/O 开销，给资源受限的边缘平台上的实时推理带来了严峻挑战。

items.title: D-Mem: A Dual-Process Memory System for LLM Agents
items.summary_short: Driven by the development of persistent, self-adapting autonomous agents, equipping these systems with high-fidelity memory access for long-horizon reasoning has emerged as a critical requirement.

topic_refs.headline: D-Mem: A Dual-Process Memory System for LLM Agents

items.title_zh: D-Mem：面向 LLM 智能体的双过程记忆系统
items.summary_short_zh: 随着持久、自适应自主智能体的发展，为这些系统配备支持长程推理的高保真记忆访问能力，已成为关键需求。

items.title: SOL-ExecBench: Speed-of-Light Benchmarking for Real-World GPU Kernels Against Hardware Limits
items.summary_short: As agentic AI systems become increasingly capable of generating and optimizing GPU kernels, progress is constrained by benchmarks that reward speedup over software baselines rather than proximity to hardware-efficient execution.

topic_refs.headline: SOL-ExecBench: Speed-of-Light Benchmarking for Real-World GPU Kernels Against Hardware Limits

items.title_zh: SOL-ExecBench：针对真实世界 GPU 内核、对照硬件极限的光速基准测试
items.summary_short_zh: 随着 agentic AI 系统越来越擅长生成和优化 GPU 内核，当前基准测试主要奖励相对软件基线的加速，而非接近硬件高效执行的程度，这限制了进展。

items.title: Prune-then-Quantize or Quantize-then-Prune? Understanding the Impact of Compression Order in Joint Model Compression
items.summary_short: What happens when multiple compression methods are combined-does the order in which they are applied matter? Joint model compression has emerged as a powerful strategy to achieve higher efficiency by combining multiple methods such as pruning and quantization.

topic_refs.headline: Prune-then-Quantize or Quantize-then-Prune? Understanding the Impact of Compression Order in Joint Model Compression

items.title_zh: 先剪枝再量化，还是先量化再剪枝？理解联合模型压缩中压缩顺序的影响
items.summary_short_zh: 当多种压缩方法结合使用时会发生什么——应用顺序是否重要？联合模型压缩已成为提升效率的有力策略，通过结合剪枝、量化等多种方法实现更高效率。

items.title: Towards Verifiable AI with Lightweight Cryptographic Proofs of Inference
items.summary_short: When large AI models are deployed as cloud-based services, clients have no guarantee that responses are correct or were produced by the intended model.

topic_refs.headline: Towards Verifiable AI with Lightweight Cryptographic Proofs of Inference

items.title_zh: 迈向可验证 AI：使用轻量级密码学推理证明
items.summary_short_zh: 当大型 AI 模型以云服务形式部署时，客户端无法保证返回结果是正确的，或确实由预期模型生成。

items.title: Secure Linear Alignment of Large Language Models
items.summary_short: Language models increasingly appear to learn similar representations, despite differences in training objectives, architectures, and data modalities. This emerging compatibility between independently trained models introduces new opportunities for cross-model alignment to downstream objectives.

topic_refs.headline: Secure Linear Alignment of Large Language Models

items.title_zh: 大语言模型的安全线性对齐
items.summary_short_zh: 尽管训练目标、架构和数据模态不同，语言模型似乎越来越倾向于学习相似的表示。这种独立训练模型之间新出现的兼容性，为面向下游目标的跨模型对齐带来了新机会。

items.title: Seasoning Generative Models for a Generalization Aftertaste
items.summary_short: The use of discriminators to train or fine-tune generative models has proven to be a rather successful framework.

topic_refs.headline: Seasoning Generative Models for a Generalization Aftertaste

items.title_zh: 为生成模型增添“调味”，留下泛化“回味”
items.summary_short_zh: 使用判别器来训练或微调生成模型，已被证明是相当成功的框架。

items.title: NeuroGame Transformer: Gibbs-Inspired Attention Driven by Game Theory and Statistical Physics
items.summary_short: Standard attention mechanisms in transformers are limited by their pairwise formulation, which hinders the modeling of higher-order dependencies among tokens.

topic_refs.headline: NeuroGame Transformer: Gibbs-Inspired Attention Driven by Game Theory and Statistical Physics

items.title_zh: NeuroGame Transformer：受博弈论与统计物理启发、由 Gibbs 驱动的注意力机制
items.summary_short_zh: Transformer 中的标准注意力机制受限于成对建模形式，这阻碍了对 token 间高阶依赖关系的建模。

items.title: Learning Decision-Sufficient Representations for Linear Optimization
items.summary_short: We study how to construct compressed datasets that suffice to recover optimal decisions in linear programs with an unknown cost vector $c$ lying in a prior set $\mathcal{C}$. Recent work by Bennouna et al.

topic_refs.headline: Learning Decision-Sufficient Representations for Linear Optimization

items.title_zh: 学习对线性优化决策充分的表示
items.summary_short_zh: 我们研究如何构造压缩数据集，使其足以恢复线性规划中的最优决策，其中未知成本向量 $c$ 位于先验集合 $\mathcal{C}$ 中。Bennouna 等人的近期工作

items.title: From Topic to Transition Structure: Unsupervised Concept Discovery at Corpus Scale via Predictive Associative Memory
items.summary_short: Embedding models group text by semantic content, what text is about. We show that temporal co-occurrence within texts discovers a different kind of structure: recurrent transition-structure concepts or what text does.

topic_refs.headline: From Topic to Transition Structure: Unsupervised Concept Discovery at Corpus Scale via Predictive Associative Memory

items.title_zh: 从主题到转移结构：通过预测关联记忆在语料规模上进行无监督概念发现
items.summary_short_zh: 嵌入模型按语义内容对文本分组，即文本“关于什么”。我们表明，文本内部的时间共现会发现另一种结构：反复出现的转移结构概念，即文本“做了什么”。

items.title: TARo: Token-level Adaptive Routing for LLM Test-time Alignment
items.summary_short: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit strong reasoning capabilities but typically require expensive post-training to reach high performance. Recent test-time alignment methods offer a lightweight alternative, but have been explored mainly for preference alignment rather than reasoning.

topic_refs.headline: TARo: Token-level Adaptive Routing for LLM Test-time Alignment

items.title_zh: TARo：用于 LLM 测试时对齐的 token 级自适应路由
items.summary_short_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）展现出强大的推理能力，但通常需要昂贵的后训练才能达到高性能。近期的测试时对齐方法提供了一种轻量替代方案，但主要用于偏好对齐，而非推理。

items.title: SpecForge: A Flexible and Efficient Open-Source Training Framework for Speculative Decoding
items.summary_short: Large language models incur high inference latency due to sequential autoregressive decoding. Speculative decoding alleviates this bottleneck by using a lightweight draft model to propose multiple tokens for batched verification.

topic_refs.headline: SpecForge: A Flexible and Efficient Open-Source Training Framework for Speculative Decoding

items.title_zh: SpecForge：一个灵活高效的开源 Speculative Decoding 训练框架
items.summary_short_zh: 由于顺序式自回归解码，大语言模型会产生较高的推理延迟。Speculative Decoding 通过使用轻量级草稿模型提出多个 token 以进行批量验证，从而缓解这一瓶颈。

topics.headline: Foundations of Schrödinger Bridges for Generative Modeling
topics.summary_short: At the core of modern generative modeling frameworks, including diffusion models, score-based models, and flow matching, is the task of transforming a simple prior distribution into a complex target distribution through stochastic paths in probability space.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Foundations of Schrödinger Bridges for Generative Modeling
evidence.title_zh: 用于生成建模的薛定谔桥基础

topics.headline_zh: 用于生成建模的薛定谔桥基础
topics.summary_short_zh: 现代生成建模框架的核心——包括扩散模型、基于分数的模型和流匹配——是在概率空间中通过随机路径将简单的先验分布转换为复杂的目标分布。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: Hierarchical Latent Structure Learning through Online Inference
topics.summary_short: Learning systems must balance generalization across experiences with discrimination of task-relevant details. Effective learning therefore requires representations that support both.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Hierarchical Latent Structure Learning through Online Inference
evidence.title_zh: 通过在线推断学习层次化潜在结构

topics.headline_zh: 通过在线推断学习层次化潜在结构
topics.summary_short_zh: 学习系统必须在跨经验泛化与区分任务相关细节之间取得平衡。因此，有效学习需要同时支持这两者的表征。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: Optimal Splitting of Language Models from Mixtures to Specialized Domains
topics.summary_short: Language models achieve impressive performance on a variety of knowledge, language, and reasoning tasks due to the scale and diversity of pretraining data available.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Optimal Splitting of Language Models from Mixtures to Specialized Domains
evidence.title_zh: 将语言模型从混合分布最优拆分到专门领域

topics.headline_zh: 将语言模型从混合分布最优拆分到专门领域
topics.summary_short_zh: 由于可用预训练数据的规模和多样性，语言模型在各种知识、语言和推理任务上取得了令人印象深刻的表现。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: Prune-then-Quantize or Quantize-then-Prune? Understanding the Impact of Compression Order in Joint Model Compression
topics.summary_short: What happens when multiple compression methods are combined-does the order in which they are applied matter? Joint model compression has emerged as a powerful strategy to achieve higher efficiency by combining multiple methods such as pruning and quantization.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Prune-then-Quantize or Quantize-then-Prune? Understanding the Impact of Compression Order in Joint Model Compression
evidence.title_zh: 先剪枝再量化，还是先量化再剪枝？理解联合模型压缩中压缩顺序的影响

topics.headline_zh: 先剪枝再量化，还是先量化再剪枝？理解联合模型压缩中压缩顺序的影响
topics.summary_short_zh: 当组合多种压缩方法时会发生什么——它们的应用顺序重要吗？联合模型压缩已成为一种强大的策略，通过结合剪枝和量化等多种方法来实现更高效率。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: Seasoning Generative Models for a Generalization Aftertaste
topics.summary_short: The use of discriminators to train or fine-tune generative models has proven to be a rather successful framework.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Seasoning Generative Models for a Generalization Aftertaste
evidence.title_zh: Seasoning Generative Models for a Generalization Aftertaste

topics.headline_zh: 为生成模型增添“调味”，留下泛化“回味”
topics.summary_short_zh: 使用判别器来训练或微调生成模型已被证明是一个相当成功的框架。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: Secure Linear Alignment of Large Language Models
topics.summary_short: Language models increasingly appear to learn similar representations, despite differences in training objectives, architectures, and data modalities. This emerging compatibility between independently trained models introduces new opportunities for cross-model alignment to downstream objectives.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Secure Linear Alignment of Large Language Models
evidence.title_zh: 大型语言模型的安全线性对齐

topics.headline_zh: 大型语言模型的安全线性对齐
topics.summary_short_zh: 尽管训练目标、架构和数据模态不同，语言模型似乎越来越多地学习到相似的表示。这种独立训练模型之间新兴的兼容性，为跨模型对齐下游目标带来了新的机会。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: SOL-ExecBench: Speed-of-Light Benchmarking for Real-World GPU Kernels Against Hardware Limits
topics.summary_short: As agentic AI systems become increasingly capable of generating and optimizing GPU kernels, progress is constrained by benchmarks that reward speedup over software baselines rather than proximity to hardware-efficient execution.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: SOL-ExecBench: Speed-of-Light Benchmarking for Real-World GPU Kernels Against Hardware Limits
evidence.title_zh: SOL-ExecBench：面向真实世界 GPU 内核、对照硬件极限的光速基准测试

topics.headline_zh: SOL-ExecBench：面向真实世界 GPU 内核、对照硬件极限的光速基准测试
topics.summary_short_zh: 随着智能体 AI 系统越来越擅长生成和优化 GPU 内核，进展却受限于这样的基准：它们奖励相对软件基线的加速，而非接近硬件高效执行的程度。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: SpecForge: A Flexible and Efficient Open-Source Training Framework for Speculative Decoding
topics.summary_short: Large language models incur high inference latency due to sequential autoregressive decoding. Speculative decoding alleviates this bottleneck by using a lightweight draft model to propose multiple tokens for batched verification.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: SpecForge: A Flexible and Efficient Open-Source Training Framework for Speculative Decoding
evidence.title_zh: SpecForge：用于推测解码的灵活高效开源训练框架

topics.headline_zh: SpecForge：用于推测解码的灵活高效开源训练框架
topics.summary_short_zh: 由于顺序式自回归解码，大型语言模型会产生较高的推理延迟。推测解码通过使用轻量级草稿模型提出多个 token 进行批量验证，从而缓解这一瓶颈。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: TARo: Token-level Adaptive Routing for LLM Test-time Alignment
topics.summary_short: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit strong reasoning capabilities but typically require expensive post-training to reach high performance. Recent test-time alignment methods offer a lightweight alternative, but have been explored mainly for preference alignment rather than reasoning.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: TARo: Token-level Adaptive Routing for LLM Test-time Alignment
evidence.title_zh: TARo：用于 LLM 测试时对齐的 token 级自适应路由

topics.headline_zh: TARo：用于 LLM 测试时对齐的 token 级自适应路由
topics.summary_short_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）展现出强大的推理能力，但通常需要昂贵的后训练才能达到高性能。近期的测试时对齐方法提供了一种轻量级替代方案，但主要探索的是偏好对齐而非推理。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: Towards Verifiable AI with Lightweight Cryptographic Proofs of Inference
topics.summary_short: When large AI models are deployed as cloud-based services, clients have no guarantee that responses are correct or were produced by the intended model.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Towards Verifiable AI with Lightweight Cryptographic Proofs of Inference
evidence.title_zh: 迈向可验证 AI：使用轻量级密码学推理证明

topics.headline_zh: 迈向可验证 AI：使用轻量级密码学推理证明
topics.summary_short_zh: 当大型 AI 模型以云服务形式部署时，客户无法保证响应是正确的，或确实由预期模型生成。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

x_buzz.title: MIT and Hasso Plattner Institute establish collaborative hub for AI and creativity
x_buzz.summary: Jointly led by the MIT Morningside Academy for Design, MIT Schwarzman College of Computing, and the Hasso Plattner Institute in Potsdam, the hub will foster a dynamic community where computing, creativity, and human-centered innovation meet.
x_buzz.linked_topic: MIT and Hasso Plattner Institute establish collaborative hub for AI and creativity

x_buzz.title: What’s the right path for AI?
x_buzz.summary: Conference speakers discussed the unfolding trajectory of AI and the benefits of shaping technology to meet people’s needs.
x_buzz.linked_topic: What’s the right path for AI?
